display.purpose: Hero and major section headers only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FFFFE3; color: #0E0E0E; padding: 12px 32px; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }

narrative.overview: A digital expression of the transition from static documentation to kinetic innovation. Content feels carved out of darkness.
dos: Do ensure all motion has a 'weighted' feel
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders or bouncy animations
